---
name: aidlc-retro
description: >-
  Run a session retrospective. Use at the end of a session to reflect on what went well, what didn't, and what to improve.
---

Read `aidlc-docs/retrospectives/session-retrospective.md` and follow its complete instructions.

Before starting, check `aidlc-docs/aidlc-state.md` for current project state.
